headline: Amazon And Spotify Considering Bids For London-Based Podcasting Platform
summary: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Spotify Technology SA (NYSE: SPOT) are each considering a potential bid for AudioBoom Group Plc, according to a Sky News

headline: Cathie Wood's ARK Investment Betting Big On Innovation; Largely On Unprofitable Companies
summary: Cathie Wood’s ARK Investment Management LLC is now focusing on shares of largely unprofitable companies.

headline: Why Apple's Business Model Won't Work For Peloton And How The Fitness Company Can Turnaround Its Business
summary: Beleaguered fitness platform Peloton Interactive, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTON), which had taken a leaf out of tech giant Apple, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) business model, may need to rethink this strategy.

headline: Elon Musk Tweets Jibe At NHTSA, Says 'Fun Police' Made Him Carry Out Latest Tesla Recall
summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) last week said that the “Boombox” function in Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) cars and SUVs breaches federal safety standards that require pedestrian warning noises for electric vehicles.

headline: McDonald's Teases 'Something's Coming' And Elon Musk Reacts: Is Doge Payment In The Cards?
summary: Fast food giant McDonald's (NYSE: MCD) does at it again. After creating a stir by a tweet in late January, calling the attention of those running crypto accounts, the company sent another late Saturday that has gone viral.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech (Feb. 13-19): Agios FDA Meeting, Avenue Adcom, Earnings And More
summary: Biotech stocks moved back and forth amid some volatility before finishing the week ending Feb. 11 modestly lower, reversing the gains from the previous week. Earnings news flow continued to dominate proceedings, and the week also witnessed presentations at conferences and a couple of initial public offerings.
